fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Indicates the IC partner code that the transaction is sent to and from.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the line number that is linked to the dimension.

fields.name: Transaction Source
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which company created the transaction.
The following table describes the two options.


Option


Description


Rejected

The transaction was rejected by the current company or IC partner.


Created

The transaction was created by the current company or IC partner.
